raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need tar with --transform to strip prefix. Use -C / to include paths. Command: tar -cf /backup1.tar --transform 's|^testbed/||' -C /testbed .? Actually want all subdirectories of /testbed, so include contents of /testbed but strip prefix. Use tar -cf /backup1.tar -C /testbed --transform 's|^testbed/||' . But . inside testbed. Maybe better: tar -cf /backup1.tar -C /testbed --transform 's|^testbed/||' . But . doesn't have prefix. Actually we want to include subdirectories, not the root. So use tar -cf /backup1.tar -C /testbed --transform 's|^testbed/||' .? Might be fine.
